title: Silke Klein Art
tagline_en: Painter portfolio — Kiel · custom WordPress rebuild
summary_en: Premium rebuild of a Kiel-based painter's website. Hand-coded WordPress theme with Advanced Custom Fields and Custom Post Types — the artist manages works, exhibitions and pages through clean WP forms, no page builder. Editorial typography, responsive gallery, fully DSGVO-compliant, self-hosted fonts and accessibility (BFSG 2025).
summary_de: Premium-Neubau der Website einer Kieler Malerin. Handgeschriebenes WordPress-Theme mit Advanced Custom Fields und Custom Post Types — die Künstlerin pflegt Werke, Ausstellungen und Seiten über aufgeräumte WP-Formulare, ohne Page-Builder. Editorial-Typografie, responsive Galerie, vollständig DSGVO-konform, self-hosted Schriften und Barrierefreiheit (BFSG 2025).

title: Ofnstube
tagline_en: Munich craft-burger restaurant — landing with reservation
summary_en: Landing site for a Munich craft-burger restaurant. Vanilla HTML5 + CSS3 + JS, multi-page (10 screens), self-hosted Fraunces + Inter fonts, GSAP + Lenis. In-house reservation, allergen disclosure (LMIV §1169), JuSchG, BFSG 2025 accessibility — fully DSGVO-compliant.
summary_de: Landing-Site für ein Münchner Craft-Burger-Restaurant. Vanilla HTML5 + CSS3 + JS, Multi-Page (10 Seiten), self-hosted Fraunces + Inter, GSAP + Lenis. In-House-Reservierung, Allergen-Kennzeichnung (LMIV §1169), JuSchG, BFSG 2025 Barrierefreiheit — vollständig DSGVO-konform.

title: ElektroCheck Stuttgart
tagline_en: DGUV V3 electrical safety inspections — Stuttgart region
summary_en: Landing site for a Stuttgart-area electrician offering DGUV V3 legally required safety inspections for businesses and private clients. Fixed-price offer, German contact form via FormSubmit, fully DSGVO-compliant. Vanilla HTML+CSS+JS, GitHub Pages, custom domain.
summary_de: Landing-Site für einen Elektromeister im Raum Stuttgart, der DGUV V3 Prüfungen für Betriebe und Privatkunden anbietet. Festpreis-Angebot, deutsches Kontaktformular über FormSubmit, vollständig DSGVO-konform. Vanilla HTML+CSS+JS, GitHub Pages, eigene Domain.

title: KONTUR
tagline_en: Specialty coffee roastery — custom WooCommerce store
summary_en: Online store for a German specialty coffee roastery. Hand-coded WordPress theme — no page builder — with WooCommerce: catalog, product pages, cart, checkout and a coffee subscription. Editorial design, compliant with German e-commerce law (DSGVO, PAngV, LMIV).
summary_de: Online-Shop für eine deutsche Specialty-Kaffeerösterei. Handgeschriebenes WordPress-Theme — kein Page-Builder — mit WooCommerce: Katalog, Produktseiten, Warenkorb, Checkout und Kaffee-Abo. Editorial-Design, konform mit deutschem E-Commerce-Recht (DSGVO, PAngV, LMIV).

title: POMP
tagline_en: Brand identity + landing for a colourful sparkling water
tagline_de: Markenidentität + Landing für ein farbenfrohes Sparkling-Water
summary_en: Full brand pack and production landing for a sparkling water concept with six flavours. Hero video, scroll-pinned flavour carousel on desktop, native snap-scroll on mobile, transparent product shots, dark/cream colour rhythm. Next.js 16, Tailwind 4, GSAP, Lenis.
summary_de: Komplettes Brand-Paket und Produktions-Landing für ein Sparkling-Water-Konzept mit sechs Sorten. Hero-Video, scroll-gepinnte Sorten-Karussell auf Desktop, natives Snap-Scrollen mobil, freigestellte Produkt-Shots, Dunkel-/Cream-Rhythmus. Next.js 16, Tailwind 4, GSAP, Lenis.

title: BauPreis AI SaaS
tagline_en: AI forecasts for smarter building budgets
summary_en: AI-powered construction material price monitoring for German contractors. 16+ materials, price forecasts, multi-tenant SaaS with three pricing tiers and Claude-driven trend analysis.
summary_de: KI-gestützte Überwachung von Baustoffpreisen für deutsche Handwerksbetriebe. 16+ Materialien, Preisvorhersagen, Multi-Tenant-SaaS mit drei Tarifebenen und Claude-Trendanalyse.

title: EKO-OYLIS UA
tagline_en: Used cooking oil collection — UA → EU
summary_en: Corporate site for a Ukrainian used cooking oil collector with EU expansion via Bulgaria. Bilingual UA/EN, 11-milestone history (2008→2026, 2500+ HoReCa partners, own fleet), Eleventy + GSAP + Lenis, schema.org, fully self-hosted.
summary_de: Firmenwebsite eines ukrainischen Altspeisefett-Sammlers mit EU-Expansion über Bulgarien. Zweisprachig UA/EN, 11 Meilensteine (2008→2026, 2500+ HoReCa-Partner, eigene Flotte), Eleventy + GSAP + Lenis, schema.org, vollständig self-hosted.

title: Rund ums Haus Littawe
tagline_en: Complete home care — fast and reliable
summary_en: Premium handyman services website for an Osnabrück business. Five service categories with WhatsApp integration, AI-generated photography, mobile sticky CTA, DSGVO-compliant.
summary_de: Premium-Website für lokales Handwerk in Osnabrück. Fünf Leistungskategorien mit WhatsApp-Integration, KI-generierte Bildwelt, Mobile-Sticky-CTA, DSGVO-konform.

title: StormGuard Professional V2
tagline_en: Premium pet care e-commerce — full rebuild
summary_en: Full rebuild of a premium organic pet care e-commerce platform. Trilingual (EN/BG/DE), Postbank BORICA payment integration, product configurator, merchant dashboard, Hetzner hosting.
summary_de: Kompletter Neubau einer Premium-Bio-Tierpflege-Plattform. Dreisprachig (EN/BG/DE), BORICA-Zahlungsintegration, Produktkonfigurator, Händler-Dashboard, Hosting auf Hetzner.

title: EDMI
summary_en: Apple-style bento landing for a dental microscope vendor. Seven real microscopes (Zeiss, CJ-Optik), eleven accessories, AI configurator, real pricing.
summary_de: Apple-Style Bento-Landing für einen Dentalmikroskop-Anbieter. Sieben echte Mikroskope (Zeiss, CJ-Optik), elf Zubehörteile, KI-Konfigurator, reale Preise.

title: Provenly Homes
tagline_en: Premium short-term rentals with motion design
summary_en: Corporate website for a short-term rental management company in Cologne. Awwwards-level scroll animations, GSAP + Motion hybrid, JSON-driven content, GitHub Pages.
summary_de: Corporate-Website für ein Kurzzeitvermietungs-Unternehmen in Köln. Awwwards-Effekte, GSAP + Motion hybrid, JSON-getriebener Inhalt, GitHub Pages.

title: Studio of Glamour
summary_en: Modern website for a Munich eyelash extension studio. Service catalog with pricing, online booking, gallery. Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui.
summary_de: Moderne Website für ein Münchner Wimpernstudio. Leistungskatalog mit Preisen, Online-Buchung, Galerie. Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui.

title: YY-DGUV Prüfservice
summary_en: B2B lead-generation website for DGUV V3 electrical safety inspections in Wernau, Baden-Württemberg. Industrial design system, fifteen-page skeleton, DSGVO-compliant lead forms.
summary_de: B2B Lead-Gen-Website für DGUV-V3-Elektroprüfungen in Wernau, Baden-Württemberg. Industrial-Design-System, 15-seitiges Gerüst, DSGVO-konforme Lead-Formulare.
